title: card-skill editorial-image mode input
description: Structured input for aspect-aware editorial images for WeChat/blog covers and in-article illustrations. The schema constrains purpose and canvas, while content_html/custom_css keep the composition open.

use.description: Editorial job. Defaults to cover behavior when omitted.

aspect.description: Canvas ratio. Defaults by use: cover/metaphor -> blog-hero, in-article -> body-3-2.

design.description: Design system name. Defaults to claude. Controls mood tokens such as paper, ink, accent, surface, and radius; it does not decide the visual metaphor.

kicker.description: Small editorial label, e.g. ESSAY, NOTES, or the aspect label.

subtitle.description: Optional short supporting line. Keep it brief.

visual_metaphor.description: One-sentence visual metaphor or scene idea.

art_direction.description: Freeform art direction. Used as guidance and fallback visual caption.

text_plan.description: Text plan for the composition, preserved as a CSS comment for traceability.

content_html.description: Trusted custom HTML composition. Use after the AI flow chooses a visual direction.

custom_css.description: Trusted custom CSS composition layer. Use for visual expression beyond the default scaffold.

source.description: Optional source line in the colophon.

logo.description: Path to brand logo image. Default: assets/logo.png

brand_name.description: Brand name in colophon footer. Default: card

examples.title: 工具让人遗忘什么
examples.subtitle: 一篇关于自动化、记忆和写作边界的札记
examples.visual_metaphor: A writing desk with one labeled drawer missing.
